data.title: CRH plc Advances Share Buyback Program with Recent Share Acquisitions
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

CRH plc ( (CRH) ) has issued an update.

CRH plc, a leading player in the building materials industry, announced the acquisition and subsequent cancellation of a significant portion of its ordinary shares as part of a share buyback program. This strategic move, involving the redemption of shares worth up to $300 million by February 2025, aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares, thereby increasing earnings per share.

More about CRH plc

data.title: Clinica Baviera Reports 2024 Liquidity Operations
data.description:
Clinica Baviera (ES:CBAV) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Clinica Baviera has reported its liquidity contract operations for the last quarter of 2024, highlighting a series of strategic purchases and sales to manage its financial positions. The company started the quarter with a balance of €141,294.32 and ended with €124,724.97, showcasing an active approach in maintaining liquidity through transactions with Renta 4 Banco.

Brockman Mining Ltd. has announced a change in the interest of its director, Ross Stewart Norgard, with the lapse of 1.5 million options. data.title: Zhenro Properties Reports Strong 2024 Sales Performance
data.description:
Zhenro Properties Group Limited (HK:6158) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Zhenro Properties Group Limited reported unaudited contracted sales of approximately RMB739 million for December 2024, with an average selling price of RMB16,400 per square meter. For the entire year, the company’s sales reached around RMB6.729 billion, reflecting a strong performance despite market uncertainties. Investors are cautioned to consider potential discrepancies with future audited figures.

data.title: Kerry Group Expands Market Presence with New Share Listing
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Kerry Group plc ( (GB:KYGA) ) has issued an update.

Kerry Group plc has announced the admission of 16,187,024 A Ordinary Shares to the Official List of Euronext Dublin and the London Stock Exchange, enhancing its trading presence. This move is expected to strengthen the company’s market position and increase liquidity, potentially benefiting shareholders and boosting investor confidence.

More about Kerry Group plc

Kerry Group plc operates in the food industry, focusing on providing taste and nutrition solutions. It offers a broad range of products including flavors, ingredients, and foodservice solutions, positioning itself as a leader in the global food and beverage market.

data.title: Atos SE Denies Ransomware Breach Allegations
data.description:
Atos SE (FR:ATO) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Atos SE has confirmed that its systems were not compromised by the ransomware group Space Bears, despite claims to the contrary. The breach involved third-party infrastructure unrelated to Atos, which contained data mentioning the company but posed no threat to its operations. Atos continues to ensure the security of its global network through its specialized experts and security operations centers.

For further insights into FR:ATO stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: CaixaBank Advances in Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
CAIXABANK (ES:CABK) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

CaixaBank has executed a series of share repurchases totaling 2,277,817 shares between December 30, 2024, and January 2, 2025, as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. The total amount spent on these purchases was approximately 11.84 million euros. This move is a step towards reaching the program’s monetary goal, having already acquired 50,249,152 shares worth 262.4 million euros, which is 52.48% of the maximum intended amount.
